---
title: "Conferences"
title-block-style: none
pagetitle: "Conferences | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Conference presentations by Dr Mesfin Genie."
page-layout: full
image: /assets/img/og-card.png
---
```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><p class="eyebrow">Conferences</p><h1>Conference presentations</h1><p class="lead">Upcoming and recent conference presentations, with published abstract records where verified.</p></div></header><section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell"><div class="grid-2"><article class="talk-card"><div class="meta">Upcoming · July 2026</div><h3>International Conference on Choice Modelling</h3><p>Eye-tracking and attribute-ordering research in multi-attribute health choices.</p></article><article class="talk-card"><div class="meta">Upcoming · October 2026</div><h3>International Academy of Health Preference Research</h3><p>Dementia support programmes discrete choice experiment.</p></article><article class="talk-card"><div class="meta">Recent · June 2026</div><h3>CDIC 2026</h3><p>Vaccine mandate and public-policy preference research.</p></article><article class="talk-card"><div class="meta">Recent · May 2026</div><h3>ISPOR 2026</h3><p>Preference and equity research in type 2 diabetes.</p></article></div></div></section>
```
